name: insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, fraudulent claims cause financial losses. We identify fraud and recommend coverage adjustments instead of manual claims review processes.
problem_solved: Fraudulent claims lead to financial losses and increased processing time.
